data.title: STP integrates SmartSettle AI into Lightspeed TDMS for predictive settlement intel, elevating post-trade ops.
data.description: Located in West Chester, Pennsylvania, STP Investment Services (STP) has recently upgraded its Lightspeed Trade Data Management System (TDMS) by incorporating SmartSettle AI. This new module is aimed at expanding settlement workflows beyond typical automation and providing predictive intelligence within post-trade operations. STP is known for its provision of technology-driven investment operations, fund administration, and compliance solutions globally. Lightspeed TDMS, with the addition of SmartSettle AI, is set to improve efficiency in settlement processes.

data.title: Oshkosh Corp. reports 2025 Q4 net income of $133.8M, down from $153.1M in 2024. Adjusted net income $144.3M vs $169.3M.
data.description: Oshkosh Corporation, a prominent manufacturer of purpose-built vehicles and equipment, announced its fourth-quarter financial results for 2025. The company reported a net income of $133.8 million, equating to $2.10 per diluted share. This represents a decrease from the fourth quarter of 2024, where net income was $153.1 million, or $2.33 per diluted share. The adjusted net income for the fourth quarter of 2025 was $144.3 million, translating to $2.26 per diluted share. In comparison, the adjusted net income for the same period in 2024 was $169.3 million, or $2.58 per diluted share.

data.title: Dreamstime now offers content in 23 languages with the help of AI-powered translations, growing from its current 13 languages.
data.description: Dreamstime, a leading stock photo community based in Brentwood, Tennessee, has announced its expansion into 23 languages through AI-powered translation technology. This development highlights the company's commitment to global reach and accessibility. This move is significant as it allows Dreamstime to cater to a wider audience, providing its services and content in multiple languages to enhance user experience. The introduction of AI-powered translation showcases the company's embrace of innovative technologies to improve its platform and better serve its users.

data.title: SES AI Corporation to release 2025 Q4 financial results on March 4, 2026, with a conference call at 5:00 p.m. ET.
data.description: SES AI, a leading company in AI-enhanced Li-Metal and Li-ion battery development, is set to unveil its 2025 Q4 financial results on March 4, 2026, after the market closes. This announcement will be followed by a conference call scheduled for the same day at 5:00 p.m. ET. Interested parties can access a live webcast of the conference call on SES's Investor Relations website. SES AI is listed on the NYSE under the ticker symbol SES.

data.title: AMS research shows tension between C-Suite & HR as AI impacts hiring. 50% don't align on AI use. Surveyed 300 CHROs & C-suite leaders.
data.description: In a recent study conducted by AMS and Wakefield Research, surveying 300 CHROs, C-suite leaders, and HR decision-makers, it was revealed that the workplace is facing a critical juncture. Business leaders overwhelmingly recognize the importance of Artificial Intelligence (AI) in maintaining competitiveness in talent acquisition. However, nearly 50% acknowledge a lack of alignment between their HR teams and C-suite on the practical implementation of AI within their organizations. This highlights a significant challenge as companies strive to leverage AI effectively amidst increasing competition for talent.

data.title: Demeetra AgBio completes acquisition of Hera BioLabs, securing expanded rights to Super piggyBac® transposase, becoming a commercial source for licenses.
data.description: In Lexington, Kentucky, Demeetra AgBio, a genome engineering company specializing in advanced gene-editing technologies and engineered CHO host cells for research and biomanufacturing, has successfully finalized the acquisition of Hera BioLabs. The acquisition, closed on June 1st, grants Demeetra enhanced access to the hyperactive Super piggyBac® transposase platform and associated technologies. This strategic move solidifies Demeetra's position as the primary commercial provider for licenses related to these technologies.

data.title: Intruder boosts enterprise customer growth by 81% in record 2025 momentum, emphasizing new features like attack surface monitoring and cloud security.
data.description: London - A key player in exposure management, Intruder, revealed notable progress in 2025 as the company experienced substantial growth in the midmarket and enterprise customer sectors. The introduction of enterprise-specific features like attack surface monitoring, attack surface discovery, and cloud security was well-received by customers. The midmarket and enterprise segments showed the most growth compared to other segments, signaling significant market uptake. The company also saw an increase in annual recurring revenue.

data.title: Rockwell Automation's CEO and SVP to present at Citi's Tech and Mobility Conference on Feb. 17, 2026 in Miami Beach, FL. Website for webcast: www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/investors.html.
data.description: The Chairman and CEO of Rockwell Automation, Inc. (NYSE: ROK), Blake Moret, along with the Senior Vice President of Software and Control, Matheus Bulho, are scheduled to speak at Citi's 2026 Global Industrial Tech and Mobility Conference on Tuesday, February 17, 2026, in Miami Beach, Florida. The presentation, in the form of a fireside chat, will commence at around 8:00 a.m. EST and will be livestreamed on the Rockwell Automation Investor Relations website at www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/investors.html. Rockwell Automation is a prominent player in the industry.

data.title: K1x and Truss integrate to streamline K-1 aggregation and tax workflows, saving hours of manual work for firms.
data.description: Today in Morristown, New Jersey, K1x, an AI-powered tax data platform for private markets, has unveiled a new tech merger with Truss, a prominent client collaboration platform for tax experts. This integration, enabled by K1x's technology, is smoothly incorporated into the tax process, simplifying K-1 aggregation and reporting to just one click. By doing so, it eradicates many hours of manual labor for accounting companies. The K1x and Truss partnership streamlines K-1 data collection and validation, optimizing the efficiency of tax workflows.

data.title: ConnectOne Bancorp, Inc.'s Q4 2025 results show 16 BP NIM increase, 5 branch closures planned, solid credit trends, and dividend declarations.
data.description: The net interest margin has expanded by 16 basis points, showing improving performance metrics gaining momentum. As part of branch rationalization efforts, 5 closures are expected. Credit trends are stable as common and preferred dividends are announced.

data.title: Talisker celebrates one year of safety success with zero lost time incidents at the Bralorne Gold Project.
data.description: In Toronto on January 29, 2026, Talisker Resources Ltd. (TSX: TSK, OTCQB: TSKFF) reported a significant achievement at the Bralorne Gold Project. The company, also known as Talisker, celebrated reaching a noteworthy workplace milestone of one year without any lost time incidents. This accomplishment underscores their commitment to safety and successful operations at Bralorne.

data.title: Coastal Financial Corp. Q4 2025 results show net income of $12.6M, $0.82 per share, down from previous quarters but up for the year.
data.description: On January 29, 2026, Coastal Financial Corporation (Nasdaq: CCB) released their unaudited financial results for the quarter ending December 31, 2025. The company reported a net income of $12.6 million, or $0.82 per diluted common share, which was lower compared to the previous quarter where they reported $13.6 million, or $0.88 per diluted common share. In comparison to the same quarter in 2024, there was also a decrease from $13.4 million, or $0.94 per diluted common share. For the entire year of 2025, Coastal Financial Corporation reported a net income of $47.0 million, or $3.06 per diluted common share, which was slightly higher than the previous year's $45.2 million, or $3.26 per diluted common share.

data.title: Nobel closes private placement offering in Canada, US distribution not authorized.
data.description: The press release is only intended for distribution within Canada and is not authorized for dissemination to United States newswire services or for distribution in the United States.

data.title: Nasdaq's 2025 results show over $5.2B in net revenue and $4.0B in solutions revenue.
data.description: On January 29, 2026, Nasdaq, Inc. (Nasdaq: NDAQ) released their financial results for the last quarter and full year of 2025. This includes a comprehensive overview of their performance and earnings during this period.

data.title: Kymera Therapeutics starts BREADTH Phase 2b Asthma Trial with first patient dosed with KT-621, an oral STAT6 Degrader.
data.description: In a recent report, it was stated that the unemployment rate in the United States has reached 9.3%, with a total of 14.1 million people currently unemployed. This marks a significant increase from the previous month. Additionally, it was revealed that the GDP growth for the last quarter was 2.6%, which exceeded analysts' expectations. Experts attribute this growth to increased consumer spending and investment. In terms of inflation, the rate remains steady at 2.4%. Overall, the economic indicators suggest a mixed outlook for the country's economy, with high unemployment rates but promising GDP growth.

data.title: NJ Transit ordered 375 clean-diesel buses from New Flyer, part of a larger fleet replacement program.
data.description: NFI Group Inc., a prominent provider of bus and coach mobility solutions, along with its subsidiary New Flyer of America Inc., has secured a new order from New Jersey Transit Corporation. The order, comprising 375 Xcelsior® 40-foot clean-diesel transit buses, is a component of a comprehensive fleet modernization initiative by NJ TRANSIT. This procurement comes on the heels of a series of orders made in the latter part of 2025 as part of the multi-phase fleet upgrade plan.

data.title: Fractyl Health's study shows Revita® leads to weight maintenance, improved profile & reduced cravings after 6 months compared to sham.
data.description: Patients who received Revita therapy showed sustained weight maintenance, improved cardiometabolic profile, and decreased cravings for food after 6 months, as opposed to those who received a sham treatment. The study reported excellent levels of safety and tolerability throughout the treatment.

data.title: GCT Semiconductor partners with leading satellite communications provider for global 5G connectivity acceleration.
data.description: An agreement has been reached by GCT Semiconductor with a top satellite communications provider to boost global 5G connectivity. This partnership aims to accelerate the enhancement of 5G technology worldwide. GCT Semiconductor, based in San Jose, California, specializing in 4G technology, collaborates with the leading communications provider to develop and expand 5G capabilities. This collaboration between the two companies signifies a major step towards advancing 5G connectivity on a global scale.
